examples: A thicket makes good cover for animals to hide in.
In front of the door he observed a bird which had caught itself in the thicket.
The hidden things silence revealed: a pheasant craning its neck to spy on us from a thicket, a crow hopping from branch to branch, a raccoon snoring in den.
And the real estate market takeoff can obscure what is still a thicket of arcane regulations on development.
But navigating the thicket of paperwork and separating good from bad advice can prove downright daunting.
